movies.original_title: On aurait dû aller en Grèce
movies.title: On aurait dû aller en Grèce

movies.overview: An amateur boxer gets his shot at a professional career.
movies.title: Challenger

movies.overview: A team of explorers discover a clue to the origins of mankind on Earth, leading them on a journey to the darkest corners of the universe. There, they must fight a terrifying battle to save the future of the human race.
movies.tagline: The search for our beginning could lead to our end.
movies.title: Prometheus

movies.overview: Little Lide disappears in the forest while her family packs up their home. As a fire breaks out, her mother must race to reach her before the flames do.
movies.title: Firebreak

movies.overview: When a man claiming to be long-lost Uncle Fester reappears after 25 years lost, the family plans a celebration to wake the dead. But the kids barely have time to warm up the electric chair before Morticia begins to suspect Fester is fraud when he can't recall any of the details of Fester's life.
movies.title: The Addams Family

movies.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.
movies.tagline: They sing. They dance. They battle demons.
movies.title: KPop Demon Hunters

movies.overview: The Addams get tangled up in more wacky adventures and find themselves involved in hilarious run-ins with all sorts of unsuspecting characters.
movies.title: The Addams Family 2

movies.overview: As São Paulo erupts in an unprecedented wave of violence, a lawyer with underworld ties must strike a deal with the police to rescue her kidnapped niece.
movies.title: State of Fear

belongs_to_collection.name: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs Collection

movies.original_title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
movies.overview: After the disastrous food storm in the first film, Flint and his friends are forced to leave the town. Flint accepts the invitation from his idol Chester V to join The Live Corp Company, which has been tasked to clean the island, and where the best inventors in the world create technologies for the betterment of mankind. When Flint discovers that his machine still operates and now creates mutant food beasts like living pickles, hungry tacodiles, shrimpanzees and apple pie-thons, he and his friends must return to save the world.
movies.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2

movies.overview: Youssef Salem, 45, has always managed to miss his writing career. But the trouble begins when his new novel becomes a success because Youssef couldn't help but be inspired by his own, for better or worse. He must now avoid at all costs that his book falls into the hands of his family.
movies.title: The In(famous) Youssef Salem

last_episode_to_air.name: The Queens' Endgame
last_episode_to_air.overview: As the women defend Trévise like lionesses, Ezéchiel trains up his new crew and the police prepare a bust to take down the bank thieves - alive or dead.

tv_shows.name: Cash Queens
tv_shows.overview: When life pushes them to the brink, five desperate friends decide the only way out is to form a gang, swipe some guns and start holding up banks.

last_episode_to_air.name: Razzmatazz
last_episode_to_air.overview: On their own, on the run and out of time, Peter and Isabel put their lives on the line to expose the conspiracy — before it silences them for good.

tv_shows.name: The Night Agent
tv_shows.overview: Brought together by a midnight phone call, an FBI agent and a cybersecurity expert must unravel an ever-growing web of political conspiracies.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: The hunt for a CIA agent accused of leaking secrets puts Peter and Rose in the crosshairs of a ruthless intelligence broker and a deadly war criminal.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: Coming off the explosive events of Season Two, Night Agent Peter Sutherland is called in to track down a young Treasury Agent who fled to Istanbul with sensitive government intel after killing his boss. This kicks off a sequence of events where Peter investigates a dark money network while avoiding its paid assassins, while putting him on a collision course with a relentless journalist. Working together, they uncover buried secrets and old grudges that threaten to bring the government to its knees -- and get them both killed in the process.

tv_shows.tagline: What began with a call became a calling.

last_episode_to_air.name: An Offer from a Gentleman
last_episode_to_air.overview: Eager to focus on her new role, Sophie finds her longing for Benedict is hard to shake. Francesca broaches a sensitive topic. Violet hosts tea for two.

tv_shows.name: Bridgerton

next_episode_to_air.name: Yes or No
next_episode_to_air.overview: A new neighbor shakes up Bridgerton House. Hyacinth and Gregory take their first steps into society. Penelope struggles with the loss of anonymity.

tv_shows.overview: Wealth, lust, and betrayal set in the backdrop of Regency era England, seen through the eyes of the powerful Bridgerton family.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: The eight close-knit siblings of the Bridgerton family look for love and happiness in London high society.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Duty, desire and scandal collide when Viscount Anthony Bridgerton decides to marry, only to meet his match in his intended bride's headstrong big sister.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: As a new crop of debutantes yearns to become the brightest of the ball, a wallflower with a double life finds her light amid secrets and surprises.

seasons.name: Season 4
seasons.overview: Despite his elder and younger brothers both being happily married, Benedict is loath to settle down — until he meets a captivating Lady in Silver at his mother’s masquerade ball.

last_episode_to_air.name: Still Alive
last_episode_to_air.overview: Unable to let go, Koleev descends upon the safe house with everything he's got. Meret and Simon will have to trust each other in order to survive.

tv_shows.name: Unfamiliar
tv_shows.overview: When the past catches up with two former spies, their biggest challenge isn't car chases, shootouts or fistfights — it's telling each other the truth.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: When the past catches up with two former spies, their biggest challenge isn't car chases, shootouts or fistfights — it's telling each other the truth.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 6
last_episode_to_air.overview: When Jolanta succeeds in turning the tide against the city officials, Niedziela demands extraordinary measures to stop her.

tv_shows.name: Lead Children
tv_shows.overview: When a young doctor discovers that children living near a smelting plant suffer from lead poisoning, she risks her career and safety to save them.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 9
last_episode_to_air.overview: Kemal's museum of broken-hearted memories and trinkets of innocence becomes a physical dedication to the ultimate love story — a decade in the making.

tv_shows.name: Museum of Innocence
tv_shows.overview: In 1970s Istanbul, a man's forbidden love for a shop-girl evolves into a lifelong journey of obsession and longing.

last_episode_to_air.name: Finding Their Voice
last_episode_to_air.overview: Arrested and charged in 2019 with child sex trafficking, Epstein spends only a short time behind bars, but his accusers still get their day in court.

tv_shows.name: Jeffrey Epstein: Filthy Rich
tv_shows.overview: Stories from survivors fuel this docuseries examining how convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein used his wealth and power to carry out his abuses.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Law of Innocence
last_episode_to_air.overview: Boxed in between Death Row Dana and a full-on federal probe, Mickey makes a last-ditch gamble that could be his salvation — or his undoing.

tv_shows.name: The Lincoln Lawyer
tv_shows.overview: Hotshot LA defense attorney Mickey Haller will do whatever it takes to win as he navigates the criminal justice system from his trademark Lincoln.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Sidelined after an accident, hotshot Los Angeles lawyer Mickey Haller restarts his career — and his trademark Lincoln — when he takes on a murder case.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: With his firm in great demand and the team busier than ever, Mickey meets a possible new love interest and takes on another high-profile case.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: Mickey takes on a personal and potentially dangerous case when he defends the person accused of murdering Gloria Dayton, his friend and former client.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Art of Sarah
last_episode_to_air.overview: As the clock runs down, Sarah fights to protect everything she's built — and Mu-gyeong follows her ever-shifting story, hoping to finally reach the truth.

tv_shows.name: The Art of Sarah
tv_shows.overview: A body found in the middle of town. A luxe label on the rise. A detective tests every stitch of a woman's story that keeps changing. What really happened?
tv_shows.tagline: Even broken lives leave beautiful traces.

last_episode_to_air.name: Rooting for You
last_episode_to_air.overview: As ratings slide, the show makes drastic changes. Tyra, the judges, and the models all confront what comes next when the "ANTM" era comes to a close.

tv_shows.name: Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model
tv_shows.original_name: Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model
tv_shows.overview: What started as a glamorous launchpad for aspiring models became a pop-culture juggernaut defined by explosive drama, public meltdowns, and controversies that still fuel viral moments today.
tv_shows.tagline: The definitive documentary about America's Next Top Model.
